/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/HelixForge.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelixForge.dir/src/AlignmentEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelixForge.dir/src/genome.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelixForge.dir/src/SequenceUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HelixForge.dir/src/AlignmentWorkflow.cpp.o -o HelixForge
